name: @mythicalos/shell
description: mythicalOS Preact-only FAMILY SHELL — the modules that must be identical across the BROKKR/SKULD/SAGA/EDDA product UIs: ProductSwitcher (the logo IS the family menu), TopBar, NavTabs, WorkspaceSplit + Rail*, SettingsLayout/SettingsNav, the family product registry, and useTheme. Built on @mythicalos/preact-ui's atoms. A future React product (asgard) gets its own React shell later — this package is deliberately Preact-only; no React, no compat. Apache-2.0.

scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun test && bun run typecheck
